title: Apply Helpful Native Validation
summary: Build and verify form native validation in cooling-service request validation review through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain form native validation from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply form native validation without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the cooling-service request validation review case · theory

content.text: Native constraints such as required, minlength, maxlength, min, max, step, and truthful type checks prevent specific impossible or incomplete states. Autocomplete communicates input purpose. Validation must accept realistic names, addresses, phone numbers, and languages. A restrictive pattern often blocks valid people while adding little security; server validation is still required. Apply it to cooling-service request validation review.
